arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool now set to submit £33.6m bid to sign player Ruben Amorim wants at Manchester United
Ruben Amorim sets challenge for Man Utd players against Southampton
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim expects to learn a lot about his Man Utd players when they host Southampton.

arts.ttl: 'Worried' - Bruno Fernandes has already shared a concern Manchester United fans may agree with
arts.sum: Man United will be expected to get the job done against Southampton at Old Trafford on Thursday night without too much fuss.

arts.ttl: “You can’t even imagine” – January move to Manchester United ‘a dream’ as announcement on way
arts.sum: Paraguayan youngster Diego León has admitted his move to Manchester United seems like a dream. The 17-year-old has been speaking to GEN in Paraguay, relayed by Versus, about his impending move to Manchester United. arts.ttl: Man Utd told to replace 'tired' Casemiro with €80m 'whole package'
arts.sum: Manchester United have been told to swoop for Sporting CP midfielder Morten Hjulmand amid talk of Casemiro heading to Saudi Arabia. Casemiro's heir apparent, Manuel Ugarte, has put in some encouraging performances of late but coach Ruben Amorim already acknowledged during his Sporting days that there is a more complete midfielder out there.

arts.ttl: FA Youth Cup fourth round preview Manchester United v Preston North End 17 January 2024
arts.sum: “Everyone is confident that we can go on and do well this year, and we couldn’t have really got off to a better start. We wanted to start on the front foot, and we got an early goal, and carried on from there.

arts.ttl: Southampton game 'will teach me more about my players than the last two', claims Man United boss Ruben Amorim as his side look to build on results at Arsenal and Liverpool
arts.sum: Expectations will be high on Thursday evening when a Southampton side rock bottom in the table with only six points from 20 games arrive at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Tottenham, Arsenal and Manchester United gearing up for €50m transfer battle before month end
arts.sum: Arsenal, Manchester United and Tottenham are all gearing up to make €50m bids for Brentford’s Bryan Mbuemo. That’s according to RMC Sport, who say all three are ‘monitoring’ the Brentford star. The Bees are ‘expecting a big cheque’ to be offered this month.
